description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo/hugo_extended:0.135.0 and sets the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Define a single job named pages (which runs in the default test stage) that first executes the before_script command "apk update && apk add git", then runs the script command "hugo". Configure the job to publish the generated public/ directory as a pages artifact (paths: public) and restrict its execution to the master branch only. No additional services, caches, or extra stages are required, and the job deploys the site to GitLab Pages.
